SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?lawSchool ?dean ?lawSchoolLabel ?deanLabel WHERE {
  ?lawSchool wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q1321960 .
  {
    ?lawSchool wdt:P17 wd:Q16
  } UNION {
    ?lawSchool wdt:P361 ?university .
    ?university wdt:P17 wd:Q16
  }
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?lawSchool wdt:P488 ?dean
  }
  .
  ?position wdt:P1022 ?lawSchool .
  ?dean wdt:P39 ?position .
  ?position wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * / wdt:P279 * wd:Q28713325 .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?lawSchool rdfs:label ?lawSchoolLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?lawSchoolLabel) = 'en')
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?dean rdfs:label ?deanLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?deanLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
```
